title: sphaerocionium simplex
intro: Sphaerocionium simplex, also known as the velvet lichen, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family of fungi and algae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium simplex include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, it has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
